reviews.comment:
Buena estacion pero la carga de combustible es muy lenta. Lo s playeros deberian ser mas rapidos. Sino que vayan a otros ACA y vean como trabajan. Y el cobro con tarjeta es insoportablemente lento.

(Translated by Google)
It's a good station, but refueling is very slow. The attendants should be faster. They should go to other ACA stations and see how they work. And card payments are unbearably slow.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZX3FxU05REAE

reviews.comment:
En el Restaurante más de media hora sentado esperando a que me atiendan, si no fuera porque estoy haciendo tiempo me hubiera marchado antes.  No existe mucha predisposición por la atención pareciera. Si bien es un muy buen parador por la calidad de lo que ofrecen, este descuido hace que uno a veces no quiera regresar.

(Translated by Google)
I sat in the restaurant waiting for more than half an hour to be served. If it weren't for the fact that I was stalling, I would have left sooner. There doesn't seem to be much interest in the service. While it's a very good inn due to the quality of what they offer, this lack of attention sometimes makes one not want to return.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRaHJhV2tBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención pero cuando pedi una factura A perdía más con la retención que lo que ganaba con el IVA. Para los responsables inscriptos esta estación de servicio no es una opción

(Translated by Google)
The service was good, but when I requested an invoice (type A), I lost more in withholding tax than I gained in VAT. For registered businesses, this gas station is not a viable option.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZNnVubi13RRAB
